evidence_label: lab quote acceptance gate, not treatment advice or contact permission
minimum_acceptance_fields: recipient class passes the June 8 qualification gate
model and disease relevance are stated
HbF or HBG readout is available
maturation and viability readouts are available
alpha-globin burden or autophagy readout is available or explicitly priced as unavailable
mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane-safety stop is available
raw data, cost, timeline, ethics, biosafety, and material constraints are stated
no private records, patient samples, treatment selection, trial screening, purchase, import, or procurement routing
reject_if: offer is HbF-only after June 9 benchmark refresh
offer asks for raw private records or patient samples
offer shifts into treatment, trial, purchase, import, or procurement advice
offer cannot state model, controls, raw-data format, cost, timeline, or safety stop
public_boundary: This gate only classifies preclinical quote offers. It does not authorize outreach or provide patient-specific medical advice.
